text: // import Scanner object public class UserInput1 { public static void main(String[] args) { // Open a Scanner object to get keyboard input int age; String name; System.out.print( "What is your full name: " ); name = input.nextLine(); // reads in a String System.out.print( "How old are you: " ); age = input.nextInt(); // reads in an integer S¥stem.out.print( '"Well, "' + name); SysSem.out.println( "', you are " + age + " years old." ); } }
